highlights.text: I wrote last Tuesday at 4pm: “Bear case tomorrow: Begins below 6699-6705.” We lost 6699 Wednesday, bears took control and we sold ultimately down to 6631 by Thursday morning.

My general lean is we re-test 6699-6705 and bulls must recover that.” Bulls got to work on this, and we hit 6699-6705 high of day Friday ripped through to 6735 yesterday, then back-tested 6699 from above yesterday.
I wrote at the close yesterday: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend.
They buy dips via my core setup: The Failed Breakdown.
It was simple zones (6699-6705) and simple setups (Failed Breakdowns).
Today was a dream session for Failed Breakdown traders.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into the setup last Thursday (Failed Breakdown) that caused the 100 point squeeze we saw since then.

post_title: "Bearish September Seasonals" Got Crushed In SPX. Can Bulls Keep The Run Going Though? October 1st Plan
